mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_SCAN_JOB_V2 WHERE is_active = 'Y') AS totalScans, s.totalTablesScanned, s.totalColumnsScanned, s.piiColumnsDetected, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_PII_REGISTRY WHERE status = 'CONFIRMED') AS confirmedPii, s.pendingReview, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_PII_REGISTRY WHERE status = 'EXCLUDED') AS excludedCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_SCAN_EXECUTION WHERE status = 'RUNNING') AS runningJobs, (SELECT MAX(DATE_FORMAT(start_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) FROM COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_SCAN_EXECUTION) AS lastScanDate FROM ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT r.db_name, COALESCE(r.schema_name,''), r.table_name) AS totalTablesScanned, COUNT(DISTINCT r.db_name, COALESCE(r.schema_name,''), r.table_name, r.column_name) AS totalColumnsScanned, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN r.score > 0 THEN CONCAT(COALESCE(r.db_name,''), '.', COALESCE(r.schema_name,''), '.', r.table_name, '.', r.column_name) END) AS piiColumnsDetected, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN r.score > 0 AND p.registry_id IS NULL THEN CONCAT(COALESCE(r.db_name,''), '.', COALESCE(r.schema_name,''), '.', r.table_name, '.', r.column_name) END) AS pendingReview FROM COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_SCAN_RESULT r LEFT JOIN COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_PII_REGISTRY p ON p.db_name = r.db_name AND COALESCE(p.schema_name,'') = COALESCE(r.schema_name,'') AND p.table_name = r.table_name AND p.column_name = r.column_name ) s

SELECT r.pii_type_code AS piiTypeCode, COALESCE(t.pii_type_name, r.pii_type_code) AS piiTypeName, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_SCAN_RESULT r LEFT JOIN COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_PII_TYPE t ON r.pii_type_code = t.pii_type_code WHERE r.score > 0 GROUP BY r.pii_type_code, t.pii_type_name ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN score >= 80 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS highCount, SUM(CASE WHEN score >= 50 AND score < 80 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS mediumCount, SUM(CASE WHEN score > 0 AND score < 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS lowCount FROM COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_SCAN_RESULT WHERE score > 0

SELECT db_name AS dbName, schema_name AS schemaName, table_name AS tableName, COUNT(DISTINCT column_name) AS piiColumnCount, COUNT(DISTINCT pii_type_code) AS piiTypeCount, MAX(score) AS maxScore FROM COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_SCAN_RESULT WHERE score > 0 GROUP BY db_name, schema_name, table_name ORDER BY piiColumnCount DESC LIMIT 10
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_SCAN_JOB_V2 ( job_id, job_name, description, target_db, target_schema, target_tables, scan_mode, sample_size, thread_count, enable_meta, enable_pattern, enable_ai, exclude_data_types, min_column_length, exclude_patterns, skip_confirmed_pii, is_active, execution_count, reg_user_id, reg_date ) VALUES ( #{jobId}, #{jobName}, #{description}, #{targetDb}, #{targetSchema}, #{targetTables}, COALESCE(#{scanMode}, 'FULL'), COALESCE(#{sampleSize}, 1000), COALESCE(#{threadCount}, 5), COALESCE(#{enableMeta}, 'Y'), COALESCE(#{enablePattern}, 'Y'), COALESCE(#{enableAi}, 'N'), #{excludeDataTypes}, COALESCE(#{minColumnLength}, 2), #{excludePatterns}, COALESCE(#{skipConfirmedPii}, 'Y'), COALESCE(#{isActive}, 'Y'), 0, #{regUserId}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT j.job_id AS jobId, j.job_name AS jobName, j.description, j.target_db AS targetDb, j.target_schema AS targetSchema, j.target_tables AS targetTables, j.scan_mode AS scanMode, j.sample_size AS sampleSize, j.thread_count AS threadCount, j.enable_meta AS enableMeta, j.enable_pattern AS enablePattern, j.enable_ai AS enableAi, j.exclude_data_types AS excludeDataTypes, j.min_column_length AS minColumnLength, j.exclude_patterns AS excludePatterns, j.skip_confirmed_pii AS skipConfirmedPii, j.is_active AS isActive, j.last_execution_id AS lastExecutionId, j.execution_count AS executionCount, e.status AS lastExecutionStatus, DATE_FORMAT(e.start_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS lastExecutionDate, j.reg_user_id AS regUserId, DATE_FORMAT(j.reg_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS regDate, j.upd_user_id AS updUserId, DATE_FORMAT(j.upd_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updDate FROM COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_SCAN_JOB_V2 j LEFT JOIN COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_SCAN_EXECUTION e ON j.last_execution_id = e.execution_id WHERE j.job_id = #{jobId}

SELECT j.job_id AS jobId, j.job_name AS jobName, j.description, j.target_db AS targetDb, j.target_schema AS targetSchema, j.scan_mode AS scanMode, j.thread_count AS threadCount, j.is_active AS isActive, j.execution_count AS executionCount, e.status AS lastExecutionStatus, DATE_FORMAT(e.start_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS lastExecutionDate, j.reg_user_id AS regUserId FROM COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_SCAN_JOB_V2 j LEFT JOIN COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_SCAN_EXECUTION e ON j.last_execution_id = e.execution_id
ORDER BY j.reg_date DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{amount}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_SCAN_JOB_V2 j
mapper.update: UPDATE COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_SCAN_JOB_V2 SET job_name = #{jobName}, description = #{description}, target_db = #{targetDb}, target_schema = #{targetSchema}, target_tables = #{targetTables}, scan_mode = #{scanMode}, sample_size = #{sampleSize}, thread_count = #{threadCount}, enable_meta = #{enableMeta}, enable_pattern = #{enablePattern}, enable_ai = #{enableAi}, exclude_data_types = #{excludeDataTypes}, min_column_length = #{minColumnLength}, exclude_patterns = #{excludePatterns}, skip_confirmed_pii = #{skipConfirmedPii}, is_active = #{isActive}, upd_user_id = #{updUserId}, upd_date = NOW() WHERE job_id = #{jobId}
UPDATE COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_SCAN_JOB_V2 SET last_execution_id = #{executionId}, execution_count = execution_count + 1, upd_date = NOW() WHERE job_id = #{jobId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_SCAN_EXECUTION ( execution_id, job_id, status, progress, thread_count, total_tables, scanned_tables, skipped_tables, total_columns, scanned_columns, excluded_columns, pii_count, reg_user_id, reg_date ) VALUES ( #{executionId}, #{jobId}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'PENDING'), COALESCE(#{progress}, 0), #{threadCount}, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, #{regUserId}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT e.execution_id AS executionId, e.job_id AS jobId, j.job_name AS jobName, e.status, e.progress, e.thread_count AS threadCount, e.total_tables AS totalTables, e.scanned_tables AS scannedTables, e.skipped_tables AS skippedTables, e.total_columns AS totalColumns, e.scanned_columns AS scannedColumns, e.excluded_columns AS excludedColumns, e.pii_count AS piiCount, DATE_FORMAT(e.start_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS startTime, DATE_FORMAT(e.end_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS endTime, e.duration_ms AS durationMs, e.error_msg AS errorMsg, e.reg_user_id AS regUserId, DATE_FORMAT(e.reg_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS regDate FROM COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_SCAN_EXECUTION e LEFT JOIN COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_SCAN_JOB_V2 j ON e.job_id = j.job_id WHERE e.execution_id = #{executionId}

SELECT e.execution_id AS executionId, e.job_id AS jobId, j.job_name AS jobName, e.status, e.progress, e.thread_count AS threadCount, e.total_tables AS totalTables, e.scanned_tables AS scannedTables, e.pii_count AS piiCount, DATE_FORMAT(e.start_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS startTime, e.duration_ms AS durationMs, e.error_msg AS errorMsg, e.reg_user_id AS regUserId FROM COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_SCAN_EXECUTION e LEFT JOIN COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_SCAN_JOB_V2 j ON e.job_id = j.job_id
ORDER BY e.reg_date DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{amount}

SELECT e.execution_id AS executionId, e.job_id AS jobId, e.status, e.progress, e.thread_count AS threadCount, e.total_tables AS totalTables, e.scanned_tables AS scannedTables, e.pii_count AS piiCount, DATE_FORMAT(e.start_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS startTime, DATE_FORMAT(e.end_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS endTime, e.duration_ms AS durationMs, e.error_msg AS errorMsg FROM COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_SCAN_EXECUTION e WHERE e.job_id = #{jobId} ORDER BY e.reg_date DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_SCAN_EXECUTION e LEFT JOIN COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_SCAN_JOB_V2 j ON e.job_id = j.job_id
mapper.update:
UPDATE COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_SCAN_EXECUTION SET status = #{status}, progress = #{progress}, start_time = COALESCE(start_time, NOW()),
end_time = NOW(), duration_ms = TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, start_time, NOW()) * 1000,
reg_date = reg_date WHERE execution_id = #{executionId}
AND status IN ('PENDING', 'RUNNING')

UPDATE COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_SCAN_EXECUTION SET status = 'FAILED', error_msg = #{errorMsg}, end_time = NOW(), duration_ms = TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, start_time, NOW()) * 1000 WHERE execution_id = #{executionId}

UPDATE COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_SCAN_EXECUTION SET status = 'COMPLETED', progress = 100, total_tables = #{totalTables}, scanned_tables = #{scannedTables}, skipped_tables = #{skippedTables}, total_columns = #{totalColumns}, scanned_columns = #{scannedColumns}, excluded_columns = #{excludedColumns}, pii_count = #{piiCount}, end_time = NOW(), duration_ms = TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, start_time, NOW()) * 1000 WHERE execution_id = #{executionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_SCAN_RESULT ( result_id, job_id, execution_id, db_name, schema_name, table_name, column_name, data_type, column_comment, pii_type_code, pii_type_name, score, meta_score, pattern_score, ai_score, meta_match, pattern_match, ai_match, matched_rule, matched_pattern, sample_data, encryption_status, encryption_method, encryption_ratio, confirm_status, reg_date ) VALUES ( #{resultId}, #{jobId}, #{executionId}, #{dbName}, #{schemaName}, #{tableName}, #{columnName}, #{dataType}, #{columnComment}, #{piiTypeCode}, #{piiTypeName}, #{score}, #{metaScore}, #{patternScore}, #{aiScore}, #{metaMatch}, #{patternMatch}, #{aiMatch}, #{matchedRule}, #{matchedPattern}, #{sampleData}, #{encryptionStatus}, #{encryptionMethod}, #{encryptionRatio}, #{confirmStatus}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT r.result_id AS resultId, r.job_id AS jobId, r.execution_id AS executionId, r.db_name AS dbName, r.schema_name AS schemaName, r.table_name AS tableName, r.column_name AS columnName, r.data_type AS dataType, r.column_comment AS columnComment, r.pii_type_code AS piiTypeCode, COALESCE(r.pii_type_name, t.pii_type_name, r.pii_type_code) AS piiTypeName, r.score, r.meta_score AS metaScore, r.pattern_score AS patternScore, r.ai_score AS aiScore, r.meta_match AS metaMatch, r.pattern_match AS patternMatch, r.ai_match AS aiMatch, r.matched_rule AS matchedRule, r.matched_pattern AS matchedPattern, r.sample_data AS sampleData, r.encryption_status AS encryptionStatus, r.encryption_method AS encryptionMethod, r.encryption_ratio AS encryptionRatio, r.confirm_status AS confirmStatus, r.confirmed_by AS confirmedBy, DATE_FORMAT(r.confirmed_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS confirmedDate, DATE_FORMAT(r.reg_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS regDate, DATE_FORMAT(r.upd_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updDate FROM COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_SCAN_RESULT r LEFT JOIN COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_PII_TYPE t ON r.pii_type_code = t.pii_type_code WHERE r.result_id = #{resultId}

SELECT r.result_id AS resultId, r.job_id AS jobId, r.execution_id AS executionId, r.db_name AS dbName, r.schema_name AS schemaName, r.table_name AS tableName, r.column_name AS columnName, r.data_type AS dataType, r.pii_type_code AS piiTypeCode, r.pii_type_name AS piiTypeName, r.score, r.meta_match AS metaMatch, r.pattern_match AS patternMatch, r.ai_match AS aiMatch, r.sample_data AS sampleData, r.encryption_status AS encryptionStatus, r.encryption_method AS encryptionMethod, r.encryption_ratio AS encryptionRatio, r.confirm_status AS confirmStatus, r.confirmed_by AS confirmedBy, DATE_FORMAT(r.confirmed_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS confirmedDate, DATE_FORMAT(r.reg_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS regDate, DATE_FORMAT(e.start_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS scanDate, j.job_name AS jobName FROM COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_SCAN_RESULT r LEFT JOIN COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_SCAN_EXECUTION e ON r.execution_id = e.execution_id LEFT JOIN COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_SCAN_JOB_V2 j ON r.job_id = j.job_id
ORDER BY CASE WHEN r.encryption_status != 'NONE' AND r.score = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC, r.score DESC, r.reg_date DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{amount}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_SCAN_RESULT r
mapper.update: UPDATE COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_SCAN_RESULT SET confirm_status = #{confirmStatus}, confirmed_by = #{userId}, confirmed_date = NOW(), upd_date = NOW() WHERE result_id = #{resultId}
mapper.delete: DELETE r FROM COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_SCAN_RESULT r INNER JOIN COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_SCAN_EXECUTION e ON r.execution_id = e.execution_id WHERE e.status IN ('COMPLETED', 'FAILED', 'CANCELLED') AND e.execution_id NOT IN ( SELECT execution_id FROM ( SELECT e2.execution_id FROM COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_SCAN_EXECUTION e2 WHERE e2.job_id = e.job_id AND e2.status IN ('COMPLETED', 'FAILED', 'CANCELLED') ORDER BY e2.start_time DESC LIMIT #{keepCount} ) AS keep_list )
mapper.select: SELECT result_id AS resultId, db_name AS dbName, schema_name AS schemaName, table_name AS tableName, column_name AS columnName, pii_type_code AS piiTypeCode, pii_type_name AS piiTypeName, score FROM COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_SCAN_RESULT WHERE confirm_status = 'CONFIRMED' ORDER BY db_name, schema_name, table_name, column_name LIMIT #{offset}, #{amount}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_RULE ( rule_id, rule_name, rule_type, pii_type_code, category, pattern, description, weight, priority, status, reg_user_id, reg_date ) VALUES ( #{ruleId}, #{ruleName}, #{ruleType}, #{piiTypeCode}, #{category}, #{pattern}, #{description}, #{weight}, #{priority}, #{status}, #{regUserId}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT rule_id AS ruleId, rule_name AS ruleName, rule_type AS ruleType, pii_type_code AS piiTypeCode, category, pattern, description, weight, priority, status, reg_user_id AS regUserId, DATE_FORMAT(reg_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS regDate, upd_user_id AS updUserId, DATE_FORMAT(upd_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS updDate FROM COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_RULE WHERE rule_id = #{ruleId}

SELECT rule_id AS ruleId, rule_name AS ruleName, rule_type AS ruleType, pii_type_code AS piiTypeCode, category, pattern, weight, status FROM COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_RULE
ORDER BY category, priority LIMIT #{offset}, #{amount}

SELECT rule_id AS ruleId, rule_name AS ruleName, rule_type AS ruleType, pii_type_code AS piiTypeCode, category, pattern, weight, status FROM COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_RULE WHERE category = #{category} ORDER BY priority
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_RULE
mapper.update: UPDATE COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_RULE SET rule_name = #{ruleName}, rule_type = #{ruleType}, pii_type_code = #{piiTypeCode}, category = #{category}, pattern = #{pattern}, description = #{description}, weight = #{weight}, priority = #{priority}, status = #{status}, upd_user_id = #{updUserId}, upd_date = NOW() WHERE rule_id = #{ruleId}
mapper.select: SELECT pii_type_code AS piiTypeCode, pii_type_name AS piiTypeName, pii_type_name_en AS piiTypeNameEn, category, description, scramble_type AS scrambleType, sort_order AS sortOrder, status FROM COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_PII_TYPE WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY sort_order

SELECT pii_type_code AS piiTypeCode, pii_type_name AS piiTypeName, pii_type_name_en AS piiTypeNameEn, category, description, scramble_type AS scrambleType, sort_order AS sortOrder, status FROM COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_PII_TYPE WHERE pii_type_code = #{piiTypeCode}
mapper.update: UPDATE COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_PII_TYPE SET status = #{status}, upd_date = NOW() WHERE pii_type_code = #{piiTypeCode}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_CONFIG ( config_id, config_key, config_value, config_type, description, is_active, sort_order, reg_user_id, reg_date ) VALUES ( #{configId}, #{configKey}, #{configValue}, #{configType}, #{description}, COALESCE(#{isActive}, 'Y'), COALESCE(#{sortOrder}, 0), #{regUserId}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT config_id AS configId, config_key AS configKey, config_value AS configValue, config_type AS configType, description, is_active AS isActive, sort_order AS sortOrder, reg_user_id AS regUserId, DATE_FORMAT(reg_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS regDate, upd_user_id AS updUserId, DATE_FORMAT(upd_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updDate FROM COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_CONFIG WHERE config_id = #{configId}

SELECT config_id AS configId, config_key AS configKey, config_value AS configValue, config_type AS configType, description, is_active AS isActive, sort_order AS sortOrder FROM COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_CONFIG WHERE config_key = #{configKey}

SELECT config_id AS configId, config_key AS configKey, config_value AS configValue, config_type AS configType, description, is_active AS isActive, sort_order AS sortOrder FROM COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_CONFIG ORDER BY config_type, sort_order

SELECT config_id AS configId, config_key AS configKey, config_value AS configValue, config_type AS configType, description, is_active AS isActive, sort_order AS sortOrder FROM COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_CONFIG WHERE config_type = #{configType} ORDER BY sort_order
mapper.update: UPDATE COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_CONFIG SET config_value = #{configValue}, description = #{description}, is_active = #{isActive}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, upd_user_id = #{updUserId}, upd_date = NOW() WHERE config_id = #{configId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_PII_REGISTRY ( registry_id, db_name, schema_name, table_name, column_name, data_type, column_comment, pii_type_code, pii_type_name, detection_method, confidence_score, sample_data, encryption_status, encryption_method, encryption_ratio, first_detected_date, first_detected_execution_id, first_detected_result_id, status, registered_by, registered_date, remarks, created_date ) VALUES ( #{registryId}, #{dbName}, #{schemaName}, #{tableName}, #{columnName}, #{dataType}, #{columnComment}, #{piiTypeCode}, #{piiTypeName}, #{detectionMethod}, #{confidenceScore}, #{sampleData}, #{encryptionStatus}, #{encryptionMethod}, #{encryptionRatio}, #{firstDetectedDate}, #{firstDetectedExecutionId}, #{firstDetectedResultId}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'CONFIRMED'), #{registeredBy}, NOW(), #{remarks}, NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE pii_type_code = VALUES(pii_type_code), pii_type_name = VALUES(pii_type_name), encryption_status = VALUES(encryption_status), encryption_method = VALUES(encryption_method), encryption_ratio = VALUES(encryption_ratio), status = VALUES(status), updated_by = VALUES(registered_by), updated_date = NOW(), remarks = VALUES(remarks)
mapper.select: SELECT r.registry_id AS registryId, r.db_name AS dbName, r.schema_name AS schemaName, r.table_name AS tableName, r.column_name AS columnName, r.data_type AS dataType, r.column_comment AS columnComment, r.pii_type_code AS piiTypeCode, COALESCE(p.pii_type_name, r.pii_type_name) AS piiTypeName, r.detection_method AS detectionMethod, r.confidence_score AS confidenceScore, r.sample_data AS sampleData, r.encryption_status AS encryptionStatus, r.encryption_method AS encryptionMethod, r.encryption_ratio AS encryptionRatio, DATE_FORMAT(r.first_detected_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS firstDetectedDate, r.first_detected_execution_id AS firstDetectedExecutionId, r.first_detected_result_id AS firstDetectedResultId, r.status, r.registered_by AS registeredBy, DATE_FORMAT(r.registered_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS registeredDate, r.updated_by AS updatedBy, DATE_FORMAT(r.updated_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS updatedDate, r.remarks, DATE_FORMAT(r.created_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS createdDate FROM COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_PII_REGISTRY r LEFT JOIN COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_PII_TYPE p ON r.pii_type_code = p.pii_type_code WHERE r.registry_id = #{registryId}

SELECT r.registry_id AS registryId, r.db_name AS dbName, r.schema_name AS schemaName, r.table_name AS tableName, r.column_name AS columnName, r.data_type AS dataType, r.pii_type_code AS piiTypeCode, COALESCE(p.pii_type_name, r.pii_type_name) AS piiTypeName, r.detection_method AS detectionMethod, r.confidence_score AS confidenceScore, r.sample_data AS sampleData, r.encryption_status AS encryptionStatus, r.encryption_method AS encryptionMethod, r.encryption_ratio AS encryptionRatio, r.status, r.registered_by AS registeredBy, DATE_FORMAT(r.registered_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS registeredDate, r.updated_by AS updatedBy, DATE_FORMAT(r.updated_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS updatedDate FROM COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_PII_REGISTRY r LEFT JOIN COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_PII_TYPE p ON r.pii_type_code = p.pii_type_code
ORDER BY r.db_name, r.schema_name, r.table_name, r.column_name LIMIT #{offset}, #{amount}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_PII_REGISTRY r

SELECT registry_id AS registryId, db_name AS dbName, schema_name AS schemaName, table_name AS tableName, column_name AS columnName, pii_type_code AS piiTypeCode, status, registered_by AS registeredBy, DATE_FORMAT(registered_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS registeredDate FROM COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_PII_REGISTRY WHERE db_name = #{dbName} AND (schema_name = #{schemaName} OR (schema_name IS NULL AND #{schemaName} IS NULL)) AND table_name = #{tableName} AND column_name = #{columnName}
mapper.update: UPDATE COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_PII_REGISTRY SET status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_date = NOW() WHERE registry_id = #{registryId}
mapper.select: SELECT CONCAT(UPPER(db_name), '.', UPPER(COALESCE(schema_name, '')), '.', UPPER(table_name), '.', UPPER(column_name)) FROM COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_PII_REGISTRY WHERE db_name = #{dbName} AND status IN ('CONFIRMED', 'EXCLUDED')
SELECT CONCAT(UPPER(db), '.', UPPER(COALESCE(owner, '')), '.', UPPER(table_name), '.', UPPER(column_name)) FROM COTDL.TBL_METATABLE WHERE db = #{dbName} AND (piitype IS NOT NULL OR val2 = 'EXCLUDED')

SELECT db, owner, table_name, column_name, data_type, piitype, piigrade, encript_flag, scramble_type, val2, val3, DATE_FORMAT(upddate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as upddate, upduserid FROM COTDL.TBL_METATABLE
ORDER BY db, owner, table_name, column_name LIMIT #{offset}, #{amount}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_METATABLE

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_METATABLE
WHERE piitype IS NOT NULL WHERE val2 = 'EXCLUDED'

if.test: search7 != null and search7 != 'PII' and search7 != 'NOTPII'

trim.if: AND val3 IS NOT NULL AND val3 != ''
AND val2 IS NOT NULL AND val2 LIKE '%|%'
AND (val2 IS NULL OR (val2 NOT LIKE '%|%' AND val2 != 'EXCLUDED'))

mapper.select:
SELECT db, owner, table_name, column_name, column_comment, column_id, pk_yn, data_type, data_length, domain, val2, encript_flag, piigrade, piitype, scramble_type, val3, DATE_FORMAT(upddate, '%Y/%m/%d') as upddate FROM COTDL.TBL_METATABLE
ORDER BY db, owner, table_name, column_id LIMIT #{offset}, #{amount}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_METATABLE

SELECT registry_id AS registryId, db_name AS dbName, schema_name AS schemaName, table_name AS tableName, column_name AS columnName, pii_type_code AS piiTypeCode, status FROM COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_PII_REGISTRY WHERE db_name = #{dbName} ORDER BY schema_name, table_name, column_name

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'CONFIRMED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS confirmedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'EXCLUDED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS excludedCount FROM COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_PII_REGISTRY
mapper.update:
UPDATE COTDL.TBL_METATABLE m INNER JOIN COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_PII_REGISTRY r ON m.db = r.db_name AND COALESCE(m.owner, '') = COALESCE(r.schema_name, '') AND m.table_name = r.table_name AND m.column_name = r.column_name SET m.val2 = CONCAT(r.pii_type_name, '|', r.confidence_score), m.upddate = NOW() WHERE r.status = 'CONFIRMED'
AND r.db_name = #{dbName}

UPDATE COTDL.TBL_METATABLE SET piitype = #{piiTypeCode}, piigrade = #{piiGrade}, encript_flag = #{encryptFlag}, scramble_type = #{scrambleType}, val3 = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y/%m/%d'), upddate = NOW() WHERE db = #{dbName} AND COALESCE(owner, '') = COALESCE(#{schemaName}, '') AND table_name = #{tableName} AND column_name = #{columnName}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COTDL.TBL_DISCOVERY_TABLE_SCAN_STATUS (execution_id, schema_name, table_name, column_count, pii_count, scan_time_ms, completed_time) VALUES (#{executionId}, #{schemaName}, #{tableName}, #{columnCount}, #{piiCount}, #{scanTimeMs}, NOW())
